outcomeModel.name: manual-physiotherapy-eligibility-verification
outcomeModel.description: Ensures accurate physiotherapy coverage decisions by identifying and resolving 'Logic Gaps' between member claims and policy constraints, leading to correct approvals, declines, or escalations.

interface.name: receive-member-claim-interaction
interface.description: "I need physio", "I want to make a claim"

whenBusinessRules.llmPrompt: Service date is 60 or more days after the member Join Date
Service date is less than 60 days after the member Join Date

facts.name: valid-exceptions-for-policy
facts.calculatedValue: ['Hospital Recovery','Accepted ACC Claim','Time spent with previous Insurer if member swapped to this insurer in 60 days']

whenBusinessRules.llmPrompt: Member exception response matches a valid exception in the Valid Exceptions list

facts.name: decision-reason
facts.calculatedValue: Covered under policy: Policy exception valid

whenBusinessRules.llmPrompt: Member exception response does not match any exception in the Valid Exceptions list

facts.name: decision-reason
facts.calculatedValue: Not covered under policy: No exceptions Met

interface.name: query-exception-circumstances-interaction
interface.description: Query the Member about whether they meet any of the valid exceptions

scenarios.error: Member response could not be interpreted in any meaningful way, clarify if member meets valid policy exceptions

whenBusinessRules.llmPrompt: Member response is not related to valid policy exceptions, or does not clearly state whether valid policy exceptions are met

scenarios.error: Members response is unrelated, attempt clarification on whether they meet valid policy exceptions

whenBusinessRules.llmPrompt: Member response matches and verifies a valid policy exception
Member response clarifies that no valid policy exceptions are met
